title: ThrowableTorch
description: Always wished you had some way to light up that dark ledge above you? Now, with a few slime balls, clay or honeycomb you too can create a throwable torch.
body: ## Throwable Torch Throwable Torch is made for Fabric; it requires the Fabric Loader & Fabric API. Always wished you had some way to light up that dark ledge above you? Now, with a few slimeballs (or some clay) you too can create a throwable torch. This is a port of the Forge mod to Fabric the original version can be found here (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/throwabletorch) Showcase:
